privileged_info_summary: No privileged information found. The task.json file is incomplete/malformed and lacks a metadata field containing claims to verify. The task is a web research exercise requiring agents to research toxicity of 4 plant substances (Easter Lily, Poinsettia, Onion, Dieffenbachia) for cats on the ASPCA website. Verification of task description claims: (1) Easter Lily - ASPCA confirms SEVERE toxicity with renal/kidney effects, can cause fatal kidney failure within 24-72 hours in cats. (2) Poinsettia - ASPCA confirms MILD toxicity (generally over-rated), causes mild gastrointestinal irritation at most. (3) Onion - ASPCA confirms causes hemolytic anemia and Heinz body anemia in cats. (4) Dieffenbachia - ASPCA confirms causes oral irritation, burning of mouth/tongue/lips. All verifier logic expectations align with actual ASPCA data.
